PluginManifest.Name: Kurisu.VoiceOverTools
PluginManifest.Title: Dialogue System Voice Over Helper
PluginManifest.Description: Voice-over asset helpers for dialogue projects. Rename VO files to a consistent {hexId}_{culture} scheme, clean up orphaned audio assets not referenced by any DialogueFragment, and strip non-primary translations + voice-over references in one pass. All commands include a dry-run preview.
PluginManifest.Tags: Voice-Over, Dialogue, Asset Management, Rename, Localization
PluginManifest.ReleaseNotes: V1.0.0- Initial release version V1.0.1- Purge Voice Over and Translations Feature V1.0.2- Added "Clean Up Orphaned Voice-Overs" command with dry-run / delete-Articy / delete-Articy+disk options. Added dry-run preview window to Rename commands with per-entry status (already correct / will rename / display-only / target exists / source missing) and click-to-navigate. New Articy-style dark theme for all plugin windows. Bug fixes: RemoveVoiceOvers now resumes localization state handling on exception; silent-placeholder WAV is cleaned from disk after removal; removed dead helpers and unused imports. V1.0.3- Plugin renamed from Kurisu.VoiceOverNamingScheme to Kurisu.VoiceOverTools (manifest Name, C# namespace, assembly, filenames). NOTE: this is a breaking rename — Articy treats it as a new plugin; uninstall the old one via Package Manager before installing 1.0.3. No behavioral changes. V1.0.4- Added "Audit Voice-Overs" command (Global): scans every DialogueFragment and flags VO references that are missing for a language, corrupted (broken proxy / file missing on disk / 0-byte file), or overlapping (the same audio asset is shared by multiple distinct fragments). Read-only diagnostic with per-category filter toggles and click-to-navigate (Show Fragment / Show VO Asset). V1.0.5- Audit Voice-Overs filtering: hard-filter excludes fragments with no Speaker assigned (narration / stage directions don't get false-positive "Missing VO" entries). New per-character dropdown filter combines with the category toggles. Each row's header now includes the speaker name for at-a-glance scanning. V1.0.6- Audit row redesign for transparency. Each entry now shows the navigator path of the fragment, the actual dialogue line in the audited language, and the issue detail in a structured 4-line layout with proper visual hierarchy (category icon + label, speaker, id+lang, path, quoted line, detail). Full ComboBox / ComboBoxItem template overrides so the character-filter dropdown is properly themed (was unreadable in dark mode previously). V1.0.7- Audit property + empty-line filtering. Each row now shows which text property the issue is for (.Text, .PreviewText, etc.) as a small monospaced badge in the header. New per-property toggle row dynamically built from the property names found in the audit (hidden when only one property type is present). New "Include empty lines" checkbox — hides rows whose dialogue text is blank by default (fragments not yet written), opt-in to include them. V1.0.8- Audit by-path filter + UX polish. New "Path:" dropdown listing all path prefixes found in the audit (top-level folders, sub-folders, deeper) — picking a prefix narrows results to fragments under that branch. Works at any depth. All filters (categories / property / character / path / include-empty) consolidated into the summary panel for a cleaner hierarchy. Custom-templated CheckBox so the empty-lines toggle blends with the dark theme (was previously default-WPF-styled and out of place). Third grid row simplified to nav-buttons-only.
